title: I will call on Him all my days

segments.text: I love Jehovah because He hears
My voice, my supplications,
Because He inclines His ear to me;
I will call on Him all my days.
Jehovah, Jehovah, Jehovah, Jehovah!
The bonds of death encompassed me,
Distresses of Sheol fell on me;
I fell upon trouble and sorrow.
But I called on the name of the Lord.
O Jehovah, I pray, deliver my soul.
I was brought low, and He saved me.
My eyes from tears, my feet from stumbling.
What shall I return to Jehovah?
Bridge:
I will walk before Jehovah in the land of the living.
I will take up the cup of salvation.
To You I will offer a sacrifice of thanksgiving,
And call on the name of Jehovah!
I will pay my vows to Jehovah in the presence of all His people,
In the courts of the house of Jehovah,
In the midst of you, O Jerusalem.
Hallelujah!
And call on Him all my days.
Lord Jesus! Lord Jesus! Lord Jesus! Lord Jesus!
Lord Jesus! Lord Jesus! Lord Jesus! Lord Jesus!
